title: GridX Pricing API Enumerations
description: Consolidated enum definitions for the GridX Pricing API.

market.description: Energy market type. DAM = Day-Ahead Market.

ratename.description: PG&E rate schedule code. AG-* = agriculture, B* = business, EELEC = residential electric, BEV* = business EV, EV2AS = residential EV.

cca.description: Community Choice Aggregator code. Optional; omit for bundled PG&E service.

representativeCircuitId.description: 9-digit PG&E distribution feeder identifier assigned to a customer service point. Encodes region, division, substation, and feeder number. Include leading zeros. See data/pge-circuit-locations.edn for the circuit-to-location mapping (98 known circuits; 59 confirmed in GridX API). Sources: PG&E 2022 Grid Needs Assessment (CPUC filing 496629893, Appendix D) and the Priicer community (https://forum.priicer.com/t/pg-e-dynamic-pilot-california/33).

priceComponent.description: Price component identifier. mec = Marginal Energy Cost, mgcc = Marginal Generation Capacity Cost, cld = Circuit Load Distribution.

priceStatus.description: Status of the price interval. Currently always 'Final' for historical prices.
